tasks.description: Run full analytics on Portfolio V1 and derive improvements

subtasks.description: Call exposure_calculator for "net","gross","long","short" exposures
Call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index with index_ticker "SPY"
Call correlation_matrix to identify high-correlation pairs (>0.5)
Call factor_tilts_for_portfolio with factors "all"
Call industry_concentration at "industry" and "sub_industry" levels
Call VaR_calculator at "portfolio" and at "industry"/"sub_industry" levels
Call calculate_portfolio_past_performance to backtest risk/return metrics
Perform own analysis: synthesize strengths, weaknesses, concentration, catalysts; propose changes (no tool)
Call add_task_evidence to attach key metrics/findings for traceability

completion_evidence: Tool episodic_recall returned list with 1 items

Portfolio V1 strengths: all hard constraints met; low beta, high quality/momentum tilt, alpha >11%, controlled drawdown, strong sub-industry/industry diversification; key sector catalysts in place. Weaknesses: intra-staples correlations (e.g., CL/KMB/PG/KO/GIS/CLX); heavy quality/momentum, negative growth tilt; gross exposure <2.0; moderate win rate/omega. Actionable improvements: reduce high-correlation staples names, modestly raise gross exposure, diversify factor tilts (value/growth), ensure short book not overly momentum-driven. Next: iterate to V2 with these changes.

Portfolio V1 analytics summary: Constraints met (16 longs, 14 shorts, net exposure 0.29, gross 1.60); low market beta (-0.11), annualized TR 16.6%, Sharpe 0.85, Sortino 1.23, max drawdown 9.8%. High alpha (0.12), strong quality/momentum tilt, but negative growth and value tilt; intra-staples correlation risk (CL/KMB/PG/GIS/KO/CLX), sub-industry weights 26–34% in largest clusters, VaR (portfolio) 2.6%. Action: Must reduce correlated staples, diversify factors, moderately increase gross. Readiness for V2 iteration.

subtasks.description: Repeat analytics suite: exposure_calculator, calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, correlation_matrix, factor_tilts_for_portfolio, industry_concentration, VaR_calculator, calculate_portfolio_past_performance
Summarize improvements/trade-offs vs V1 (no tool)

completion_evidence: Tool episodic_recall returned list with 1 items
Tool pull_rest_of_ticker_pool returned list with 73 items

Portfolio V2 analytics: 17 longs, 14 shorts; net exposure 0.28, gross 1.60; long exposure 0.94, short 0.66. Beta -0.05 (down from -0.11), alpha improved to 0.16, Sharpe 1.35, Sortino 1.98, annualized total return 21.4%, lower max drawdown (8.4%). Correlation clusters shrunk: household products and staples reduced; more retail/beverage/tobacco names. Factor: momentum tilt improved (0.30), quality tilt still positive (0.45), value/growth closer to neutral. Industry risk better distributed: food, beverages, retail, tobacco, personal care all <38%. VaR 2.6%. V2 portfolio is more diversified, higher alpha, lower volatility, improved risk/return metrics.
Tool episodic_recall returned list with 1 items

Portfolio V2 improvements vs V1: 1) Industry/sub-industry clusters reduced by removing/downsizing overlap in household and food staples, adding retail (WMT, SFM), beverage (PEP), tobacco (MO); 2) Gross remains 1.6, net 0.28; 3) Beta improved from -0.11 to -0.05, VaR stable at 2.6%, Sharpe up to 1.35, Sortino to 1.98, annualized TR 21.4% (vs ~16% prior); 4) Factor tilts are more balanced, still strong quality/momentum but less anti-growth; 5) Largest sub-industry <32% (prior >35%). Result: more diversified, higher alpha, lower drawdown, and better resilience to staples/sector drawdowns.

tasks.description: Decide on final portfolio and optimize with risk controls; validate all constraints

subtasks.description: Select final positions meeting hard constraints (15-20 longs, 10-15 shorts, net ~+0.30, gross ≤2.00); finalize portfolio_dict
Call build_portfolio with final portfolio_dict to optimize weights and get risk metrics
Validate with exposure_calculator, calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, correlation_matrix, VaR_calculator, industry_concentration; iterate if any constraint violated
If blocked, call handle_task_failure to recover and iterate (e.g., V4+)
Call check_plan_completion_status to confirm readiness for final answer
Call add_task_evidence to store final metrics and rationale
Use update_task_status and add_task_evidence to log progress and evidence per task/subtask
Use advance_to_next_task and get_current_task_info to sequence and context-switch safely
Use get_task_progress_summary and get_execution_summary to monitor completion percentages
Use get_execution_analytics and get_plan_health_status/get_plan_analytics_report to diagnose bottlenecks
Use add_task_to_plan/remove_task_from_plan to adjust scope as insights emerge
Use get_completion_analysis for final validation confidence before delivery
Format final output as JSON array with fields: "ticker","position","thesis","key_drivers","allocation"
Ensure any displayed portfolio_dicts follow Dictionary Format Rules (one line, double quotes, numbers unquoted, no trailing commas)
Deliver final portfolio JSON and brief justification; avoid hallucination; cite constraints satisfaction
